title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Unknown person #7, Yamato, Unknown person #8 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's about to use his fire breath!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right! Counter it with your own breath!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm in no position to fight right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WHAT?! Luffy, WAIT!! I CAN'T!! THAT'S IMPOSSIBLE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way, no way, no way, no way, no way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: was a fool of a Lord!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You ruined Wano!! If it weren't for you...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
